wikitext:
[]: Rez Trance Vibes - The Image Macro/Caption Thread             Quote Post by Catamari » Thu May 09, 2013 8:27 am We've all seen Reichu's image macros , plus, there are a lot of excellent pictures in the four Evangelion images threads that deserve to be macro'd. The funnier, the better. Post the original along with your macro. Here are ten images that I picked from the images thread #4 to get you all started (mostly from Stryker's massive dump), but don't feel limited to just them. Some of the images are too big to see properly in an image tag, so I just linked them. Rei's excited. Come on, Rei, it's cute! Schoolgirl Ayanami Tricycle Ayanami IT'S GENDOU Gaijin 4Shinji This Idiocy Brought To You By... Teh Bootay Shinji is worried what Gendou will think Classic Rez Trance It should go without saying, but Q Spoilers and NSFW images should be tagged and spoiler'd as such. You can use this site to add captions. EDIT: Here's a quick one I did.
